nodes.label: AI as information provider vs teacher
nodes.grounding_span: I must make a distinction between asking for information and being taught new information

nodes.label: AI for clarity and conciseness in writing
nodes.grounding_span: Perpelexity gives me the starting point of a good paper in three pages where as the other Ais will give me 20 pages of nothing actionable

nodes.label: AI reliability and honesty
nodes.grounding_span: I have to check every number and every fact and every source

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: It's a starting place. As I said, it can sometimes be a good structure to follow

nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI usefulness for complex nuanced tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If I have to create an add with a picture, I can use AI. If I need to do that 100 x thats Ai, a simple thing thats repetative

nodes.label: AI optimistic bias in interpretation
nodes.grounding_span: some one could be yelling at you in another language and it will say this is playful

nodes.label: Accuracy and factual reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I have to check every number and every fact and every source

nodes.label: Learning and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I will get AI to extract that information, so I can put it into a proper PDF

nodes.label: Business growth and profitability
nodes.grounding_span: It means I could then build better business

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for communications
nodes.grounding_span: Perpelexity gives me the starting point of a good paper in three pages

nodes.label: Frustration with AI training difficulty
nodes.grounding_span: It isn't very good at identifying where you are having the issue in understanding

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: some one could be yelling at you in another language and it will say this is playful

nodes.label: Excitement about AI's potential for automation
nodes.grounding_span: if there was an easy way, and an easy interface, that you could set up workflows with a couple of click that would be fantastic

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: three houts later I was frustrated because I could have been working on more meaningful work

nodes.label: Strategic multi-tool orchestration — uses different AI models for different strengths
nodes.grounding_span: I often fall back to Perplexity (free version) as it's short, concise, and to the point. I might then take that information and use Claude or ChatGPt for extrapolation

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through conversation
nodes.grounding_span: I will then start a new conversation with a different direction focussing on what I need now
